SEABOURNE-SEABOURNE_STARTER_RELIC.title: Placeholder Starter Relic
SEABOURNE-SEABOURNE_STARTER_RELIC.descri: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Cast.
SEABOURNE-SEABOURNE_STARTER_RELIC.flavor: A tideworn keepsake that always finds the line again.
SEABOURNE-CAST_BLOCK_RELIC.title: Common Relic
SEABOURNE-CAST_BLOCK_RELIC.flavor: A steady hand on the line keeps the worst of the sea at bay.
SEABOURNE-GEM_CHOICE_RELIC.title: Uncommon Relic
SEABOURNE-GEM_CHOICE_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, choose 1 of 2 random gems to acquire.
SEABOURNE-GEM_CHOICE_RELIC.flavor: Treasure answers those who know how to listen to the current.
SEABOURNE-IMBUE_START_RELIC.title: Uncommon Relic
SEABOURNE-IMBUE_START_RELIC.description: At the start of combat, give 2 cards in the draw pile Imbued 1.
SEABOURNE-IMBUE_START_RELIC.flavor: Old magic seeps into whatever it touches first.
SEABOURNE-REEL_COST_RELIC.title: Rare Relic
SEABOURNE-REEL_COST_RELIC.description: When you reel, reduce the cost of the hooked card by 1 this turn.
SEABOURNE-REEL_COST_RELIC.flavor: Once the hook bites, the rest comes easily.
SEABOURNE-WATERWALL_END_RELIC.title: Rare Relic
SEABOURNE-WATERWALL_END_RELIC.descriptio: At the end of your turn, gain 5 Waterwall.
SEABOURNE-WATERWALL_END_RELIC.flavor: The tide remembers how to shield its own.
SEABOURNE-CANNON_DAMAGE_RELIC.title: Rare Relic
SEABOURNE-CANNON_DAMAGE_RELIC.flavor: A heavier powder charge solves many problems.
SEABOURNE-STRIKE_AND_DEFEND_IMBUED_RELIC: Even the simplest drills can be taught to sing with power.
SEABOURNE-DAMAGE_CAST_RELIC.title: Shop Relic
SEABOURNE-DUSTY_TOME_RELIC.title: Dusty Tome
SEABOURNE-DUSTY_TOME_RELIC.description: Plunder 1. Gain 5 Gem Slots. Gain a random unique gem each turn. Innate.
SEABOURNE-DUSTY_TOME_RELIC.flavor: Its pages smell of salt, gold, and old promises.
